Class Weapon

java.lang.Object
MyGame.GameObject.Weapon.Weapon
All Implemented Interfaces:
Renderable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Aura, BiocatalystCore, BoomerangWeapon, Bow, ChaosCore, CryptoCore, DataCore, DynamoCore, EntropyCore, FractalCore, KineticCore, LightningWeapon, MatrixCore, OrbitRock, OverClockCore, OverHeatCore, PlasmaCore, ResonanceCore, SiphonCore, SomaticCore, SurgeCore, Sword, VectorCore
public abstract class Weapon extends Object implements Renderable
The base abstract class for all player weapons, handling firing logic and upgrades.
